  • Constructor Details

    • SimTest

      public SimTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp()

    • testConstructor

      public void testConstructor()
      Tests the Sim constructor. Verifies that name, UUID, age, activity end time, bank balance, needs, and relationships are initialized correctly.

    • testGetters

      public void testGetters()
      Tests the getter methods for Sim properties. Ensures that name, UUID, age, activity end, bank, needs, and relationships are correctly retrieved.

    • testSetCareer

      public void testSetCareer()
      Tests the setCareer method. Verifies that the Sim's career can be updated correctly.

    • testBankInitialization

      public void testBankInitialization()
      Tests the initial bank balance. Ensures that the Sim starts with the default bank balance of 500.

    • testUpdateBank

      public void testUpdateBank()
      Tests the updateBank method. Verifies that bank balance can be decreased (spending) or increased (earning).

    • testUpdateNeedsRegular

      public void testUpdateNeedsRegular()
      Tests the updateNeeds method with regular updates. Verifies that need values are updated correctly and capped at 100.

    • testSetCurrentLocation

      public void testSetCurrentLocation()
      Tests the setCurrentLocation method. Ensures that the Sim's current location can be updated.

    • testSetHome

      public void testSetHome()
      Tests the setHome method. Verifies that the Sim's home can be changed.

    • testActivityEndInitialization

      public void testActivityEndInitialization()
      Tests the initial activity end time. Ensures that activity end is initialized to -1 (no activity).

    • testSetActivityEnd

      public void testSetActivityEnd()
      Tests the setActivityEnd method. Verifies that activity end time is calculated correctly as current time plus duration.

    • testPerformDecayCurrentSim

      public void testPerformDecayCurrentSim()
      Tests the performDecay method for the current Sim. Verifies that decay is applied to all needs except the excluded one.
